title: T-Cut Chrome Cleaner, Metal Polish, 150 g (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
T-Cut original metal polish cleans, restores and polishes chrome, brass, stainless steel, nickel copper, aluminium, alloy and many other metals.

T-Cut original metal polish will also protect Against tarnishing and discolouration and is suitable for all manner of applications including automotive, motorcycles, marine, sports & Leisure, domestic appliances and general home use.
Apply using a soft cloth, working into the area to be cleaned, then polish off and buff to a high shine. Can also be applied using a small brush. Repeat if necessary.
description: From the manufacturer Since 1954, T-Cut has been looking after the nation’s cars. T-Cut is always asked for by name and is synonymous with removing scratches and restoring vehicle paintwork. The range today consists of waxes, detailers and technical restoration products to give your car that special showroom finish. T-Cut is proud to be owned and manufactured in Britain. T-Cut Metal Polish 100g T-Cut Metal Polish cleans, restores & polishes chrome, brass, stainless steel, nickel copper, aluminium, alloy & many other metals. It will cut through any surface corrosion & oxidisation to restore a brilliant shine & lustre, even if the metal hasn’t been cleaned for years! T-Cut Metal Polish will also protect against tarnishing and discolouration & is suitable for all manner of applications including automotive, motorcycles, marine, sports & leisure, domestic appliances & general home use.
